name: hippocampusmd
description: Agent memory OS for local markdown knowledge systems.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and maintain local markdown memory for Codex.
interface.longDescription: HippocampusMD provides Codex skills for deriving, maintaining, querying, and evolving local markdown knowledge graphs, with Obsidian-friendly conventions and agent-native workflows.
defaultPrompt: Set up HippocampusMD for my vault.
Process this source into my knowledge graph.
